allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys, json; lines = sys.stdin.readlines\(\); [print\(json.loads\(l\).get\(''content'', ''''\)[:500] if isinstance\(json.loads\(l\).get\(''content''\), str\) else ''''\) for l in lines[-20:]]")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json lines = sys.stdin.readlines\(\) for line in lines[-30:]: try: obj = json.loads\(line\) role = obj.get\(''role'', ''''\) content = obj.get\(''content'', ''''\) if isinstance\(content, list\): for item in content: if isinstance\(item, dict\) and item.get\(''type''\) == ''text'': print\(f''[{role}]: {item[""text""][:300]}''\) elif isinstance\(content, str\): print\(f''[{role}]: {content[:300]}''\) except: pass ")
